item.title: Karnataka: 700 Sheep And Lambs Burnt To Death After Massive Shed Fire In Raichur’s Sindhanur
item.description:
<![CDATA[Around 700 sheep and lambs were burnt to death after a massive fire broke out at a sheep shed in Mukkunda village of Sindhanur taluk in Karnataka’s Raichur district in the early hours of Friday. The blaze reportedly began around 3 am and spread rapidly across the shed before emergency teams could bring it under control.
The livestock belonged to local sheep rearer Y. Hemalatha Madhusudan Rao, whose animals were kept there for breeding and commercial sale. Villagers alerted nearby fire stations ...]]>
